name: Mingle Mangle (Warm Zucchini Salad)
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Fresh basil, chopped plus 1 tablespoon
3/4 pound Zucchini, sliced into 1/8 inch pieces
2 medium Tomatoes, peeled, seeded, and cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a large heavy skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the shallots; cook for 1 minute.
3. Add the cream and 1/4 cup basil. Heat to boiling.
4. Reduce the heat. Simmer, stirring occasionally until thick, about 10 minutes.
5. Add the lemon juice, vinegar, hot pepper sauce, and salt and pepper to taste.
6. Stir in the zucchini and toss it until well coated.
7. Add the tomatoes; toss lightly.
8. Sprinkle with the remaining 1 tablespoon basil.
9. Serve immediately.
